summary: Launch is risky until the high-severity findings are fixed.

findings.title: API mutation route has no auth guard evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without auth keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Unauthenticated mutation endpoints can expose user data or admin actions.
findings.remediation: Verify users server-side before mutating data.

findings.title: API mutation route has no auth guard evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without auth keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Unauthenticated mutation endpoints can expose user data or admin actions.
findings.remediation: Verify users server-side before mutating data.

findings.title: Route protection appears client-side only
findings.evidence: client redirect/localStorage auth marker
findings.why_it_matters: Client-only checks can be bypassed by direct requests.
findings.remediation: Move authorization checks to middleware or server handlers.

findings.title: Wide-open write policy on users
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Service role full access to users ON public.users FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public writes can mutate users data unless another boundary exists.
findings.remediation: Scope write policies to authenticated users, ownership, or admin roles.

findings.title: Wide-open write policy on user_preferences
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Service role full access to preferences ON public.user_preferences FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public writes can mutate user_preferences data unless another boundary exists.
findings.remediation: Scope write policies to authenticated users, ownership, or admin roles.

findings.title: Wide-open write policy on user_trials
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Service role full access to trials ON public.user_trials FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public writes can mutate user_trials data unless another boundary exists.
findings.remediation: Scope write policies to authenticated users, ownership, or admin roles.

findings.title: Wide-open write policy on subscriptions
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Service role full access to subscriptions ON public.subscriptions FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public writes can mutate subscriptions data unless another boundary exists.
findings.remediation: Scope write policies to authenticated users, ownership, or admin roles.

findings.title: Wide-open write policy on user_email_log
findings.evidence: CREATE POLICY Service role can manage email logs ON public.user_email_log FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);
findings.why_it_matters: Public writes can mutate user_email_log data unless another boundary exists.
findings.remediation: Scope write policies to authenticated users, ownership, or admin roles.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: Public mutation endpoint has no rate-limit evidence
findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.evidence: mutation route without rate limit keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Public mutation endpoints can be abused.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting around public mutation routes.

findings.title: No protected route middleware found
findings.why_it_matters: Next.js apps commonly need server-side route protection beyond client state.
findings.remediation: Add middleware or an equivalent server-side protected route pattern.

findings.title: No Supabase/Postgres migrations directory found
findings.why_it_matters: Production schema changes need reviewable migration history.
findings.remediation: Add migrations under supabase/migrations or an equivalent tracked migration folder.

findings.title: Stripe event handling lacks idempotency evidence
findings.evidence: event handler without idempotency keyword
findings.why_it_matters: Stripe may retry events, causing duplicate grants or updates.
findings.remediation: Store processed event IDs or use idempotent writes.

findings.title: No CI workflow found
findings.why_it_matters: Critical flows need automated checks before launch.
findings.remediation: Add a GitHub Actions workflow for tests and linting.

findings.title: Privacy policy or terms page is missing
findings.evidence: privacy/terms
findings.why_it_matters: Apps collecting user or payment data need clear trust and legal surfaces.
findings.remediation: Add privacy and terms pages linked from the app.

findings.title: Generic AI launch copy found
findings.evidence: generic AI copy marker
findings.why_it_matters: Generic launch copy makes the app feel unfinished.
findings.remediation: Use concrete customer outcomes and specific product language.

findings.title: Placeholder copy found
findings.evidence: Chart Placeholder
findings.why_it_matters: Placeholder content reduces buyer trust.
findings.remediation: Replace placeholders with specific product copy.
